nasb.text: Then after an interval of fourteen years I went up again to Jerusalem with Barnabas, taking Titus along also.

esv.text: Then after fourteen years I went up again to Jerusalem with Barnabas, taking Titus along with me.

cnv.text: 過了十四年，我再次上耶路撒冷去，這次是和巴拿巴，並且帶著提多一同去的。

ccb.text: 十四年后，我和巴拿巴又去耶路撒冷，并带了提多同去。

csbs.text: 过了十四年，我与巴拿巴一起再次上耶路撒冷，并且带着提多一起去。
